name: Brett Favre's Crawfish Etoufee
recipeIngredient: 3 Cans Cream Of Mushroom Soup, 10.5 Oz Each
2 Cans Diced Tomatoes With Green Chiles, 10 Oz Ea, Undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot or cast-iron Dutch oven, melt the margarine.
2. Add the chopped peppers, celery, and onion. Saute until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the cream of mushroom soup and cook over low heat, stirring occasionally, for 20 to 30 minutes.
4. Add the crawfish tails and cook an additional 30 to 40 minutes, or until the seafood is heated through.
5. Stir in the diced tomatoes with their liquid and blend well.
6. Serve hot over cooked white rice in individual serving bowls. Makes about 4 servings.
This recipe is a Southern specialty from Green Bay Packers quarterback Brett Favre and his wife, Deanna. Published in the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel on 10/15/97.
